Name: CHR_NETWORK_PHANTOM_PARAM
Description: Network phantom (multiplayer ghost/entity) behavior parameters controlling appearance effects, multiplayer rules, scaling, rewards, and session constraints.

Fields.Name: Level 0: Shader Type
Fields.Description: The shader type for constraint level 0.

Fields.Name: Level 0: Full Body SFX
Fields.Description: The full body sfx entry for constraint level 0.

Fields.Name: Level 1: Full Body SFX
Fields.Description: The full body sfx entry for constraint level 1.

Fields.Name: Level 2: Full Body SFX
Fields.Description: The full body sfx entry for constraint level 2.

Fields.Name: Level 3: Full Body SFX
Fields.Description: The full body sfx entry for constraint level 3.

Fields.Name: Appearance Motion Type
Fields.Description: The appearance motion type for this phantom.

Fields.Name: HP Threshold for Speed Reduction (Min %)
Fields.Description: Lower HP percentage threshold at which movement speed reduction begins to apply.

Fields.Name: HP Threshold for Speed Reduction (Max %)
Fields.Description: Upper HP percentage threshold for full movement speed reduction effect.

Fields.Name: Movement Speed Reduction %
Fields.Description: Percentage reduction applied to movement speed under low HP conditions.

Fields.Name: Spawn SFX ID
Fields.Description: SFX effect ID played when the phantom is created.

Fields.Name: Spawn Full Body SFX
Fields.Description: Full-body SFX effect configuration used on spawn.

Fields.Name: Death Type
Fields.Description: Defines how the phantom behaves or is handled upon death.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Time Limit
Fields.Description: Maximum duration allowed in a multiplayer session for this phantom. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Return Delay After Multiplayer Ends
Fields.Description: Time delay before returning after multiplayer session ends. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Return Position: Success
Fields.Description: Respawn position used when multiplayer ends successfully.

Fields.Name: Return Position: Failure
Fields.Description: Respawn position used when multiplayer ends in failure.

Fields.Name: Return Position: Death
Fields.Description: Respawn position used when the phantom dies during multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Reserved
Fields.Description: Unused reserved parameter slot.

Fields.Name: Return State: Success
Fields.Description: Player state applied when returning after successful multiplayer completion.

Fields.Name: Return State: Failure
Fields.Description: Player state applied when returning after failed multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Return State: Death
Fields.Description: Player state applied when returning after death in multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Reserved
Fields.Description: Unused reserved parameter slot.

Fields.Name: Voice Chat Settings
Fields.Description: Defines voice chat behavior or availability for the phantom.

Fields.Name: Allow Host Forced Return
Fields.Description: Determines whether the host can force the phantom to return.

Fields.Name: Allow Manual Return
Fields.Description: Determines whether the phantom can return voluntarily.

Fields.Name: Enable Handicap System
Fields.Description: Enables gameplay balancing adjustments for multiplayer phantoms.

Fields.Name: Maximum HP Scaling Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to maximum HP in multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Summon Enabled
Fields.Description: Defines whether the phantom is treated as a summoned entity.

Fields.Name: Allow Summon Support
Fields.Description: Enables support actions for summoned players or entities.

Fields.Name: Allow Boss Soul Acquisition
Fields.Description: Determines whether souls can be obtained from bosses.

Fields.Name: Allow Enemy Soul Acquisition
Fields.Description: Determines whether souls can be obtained from regular enemies.

Fields.Name: Allow NPC Soul Acquisition
Fields.Description: Determines whether souls can be obtained from NPCs.

Fields.Name: Allow Host Soul Acquisition
Fields.Description: Determines whether souls can be obtained from the host player.

Fields.Name: Allow Phantom Soul Acquisition
Fields.Description: Determines whether souls can be obtained from network phantoms.

Fields.Name: Healing Item Usage Type
Fields.Description: Defines restrictions or rules for using healing items.

Fields.Name: Soul Gain Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to soul rewards earned in multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Visual Fade Step 1
Fields.Description: Time until the first stage of visual fading occurs in multiplayer. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Visual Fade Step 2
Fields.Description: Time until the second stage of visual fading occurs in multiplayer. In seconds

Fields.Name: Level 1 Constraint Shader Type
Fields.Description: Shader used for Level 1 constraint state.

Fields.Name: Level 2 Constraint Shader Type
Fields.Description: Shader used for Level 2 constraint state.

Fields.Name: Level 3 Constraint Shader Type
Fields.Description: Shader used for Level 3 constraint state.

Fields.Name: Boss Soul Gain Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied specifically to souls gained from bosses.
